issue_title: enhancement: min() / max() for ZodMap
issue_excerpt: ZodSet supports size constraints, but ZodMap lacks equivalent minimum, maximum, nonempty, and size introspection capabilities.
intent: Bring map schemas to parity with other collection schemas for size constraints and expose the resulting metadata consistently.
commit_subject: feat(v4): add min, max, nonempty, & size to ZodMap (#5316)

issue_title: Add QR code generation to image functions for offline permalinks
issue_excerpt: Printed pages would benefit from embedding a scannable link to the current online permalink without depending on an external service.
intent: Provide first-class QR image generation for templates and the built-in shortcode path, including offline operation and integration coverage.

issue_title: Add  crypto.Hash(algo string)
issue_excerpt: Templates need a general hashing operation compatible with the algorithms represented by fingerprinted-resource integrity metadata, with a useful default when no algorithm is given.
intent: Add a template-facing hash capability that supports the expected integrity algorithms, validates requests, and composes with existing encoding functions.

issue_title: JsonWriter don't work correctly with float
issue_excerpt: Passing a float to JsonWriter selects the double overload and can emit unexpected extra digits, so the serialized value no longer matches the float users supplied.
intent: Support writing float values with the representation users expect, while retaining JsonWriter's numeric validation behavior.
commit_subject: Add explicit support for floats in JsonWriter. (#2130)

issue_title: Multiple invocation of the `TypeAdapter.nullSafe` method causes the given type adapter to be wrapped recursively.
issue_excerpt: Calling TypeAdapter.nullSafe() repeatedly wraps an adapter recursively, creating avoidable nesting instead of an idempotent null-safe result.
intent: Make repeated requests for a null-safe adapter behave consistently without accumulating wrappers, while preserving read and write semantics.

issue_title: allow setting encoding in open_resource()
issue_excerpt: Opening text resources with the platform default encoding can fail for UTF-8 files on Windows, forcing callers into binary mode and manual decoding.
intent: Allow callers to select the text encoding when opening application or blueprint resources, with consistent API behavior and regression coverage.

issue_title: extend config for Request form memory settings
issue_excerpt: Werkzeug exposes several request form-parsing limits, but Flask only makes one available application-wide. Users need the remaining limits and per-request control.
intent: Expose the full set of request form-parsing limits through Flask configuration while allowing an individual request to override application defaults. Keep the public behavior documented and test-covered.
commit_subject: add config and docs for limits

issue_title: Impl Serialize/Deserialize for std::num::Saturating<T>
issue_excerpt: Users cannot directly serialize or deserialize std::num::Saturating wrappers even when the wrapped numeric type already supports Serde.
intent: Add serialization and deserialization support for saturating numeric wrappers across supported Rust versions, with boundary-focused tests.

issue_title: JoinHandle variant that abort on drop.
issue_excerpt: Applications frequently build wrappers around JoinHandle to abort leaked tasks when the handle is dropped; this cancellation pattern is useful enough to provide directly.
intent: Provide a task handle utility that aborts its task on drop while retaining access to normal join-handle operations and outcomes.

issue_title: Pipes are missing a `try_io` method
issue_excerpt: Unix pipe readiness is cached until an I/O attempt returns WouldBlock, which prevents external I/O operations from correctly coordinating with the pipe's readiness state.
intent: Expose nonblocking readiness-aware I/O hooks on Unix pipe sender and receiver types so external operations can participate safely.
commit_subject: net: add 'try_io' function to 'unix::pipe' sender and receiver types (#8030)

issue_title: Datetime validation without offset should allow omission of Z zone designator
issue_excerpt: ISO-8601 permits a datetime without a zone designator to represent local time, but the datetime validator rejects that form when offsets are disabled.
intent: Accept valid local datetime strings when no offset is required, while preserving strict handling of malformed dates, times, and offsets.

issue_title: Mutation of ctx param is unintuitive
issue_excerpt: Parse and decode operations mutate a caller-provided context object, so reusing the same options across calls can change later behavior unexpectedly.
intent: Keep caller-owned parse context immutable across forward and backward operations and add coverage for repeated reuse.
commit_subject: fix: preserve context immutability in parse functions (#5632)

issue_title: `z.union([])` and `z.xor([])` throw internal error on parse
issue_excerpt: Parsing an empty union or xor schema throws an internal error even though its inferred type is never.
intent: Handle empty union-family schemas as a defined validation case in both classic and mini APIs instead of exposing an internal failure.
commit_subject: fix(v4): construct empty unions instead of crashing (#5869)

issue_title: Empty list items in table of contents when heading structure skips a level
issue_excerpt: When heading levels are skipped, generated tables of contents contain empty list items instead of a clean hierarchy.
intent: Generate valid, compact table-of-contents markup for documents that skip heading levels, while retaining existing numbering and rendering behavior.

issue_title: Fix shaky test / params YAML alias merge issue
issue_excerpt: Language parameter merging with YAML anchors is flaky and appears to share mutable map entries across configurations.
intent: Prevent language configuration merges from mutating shared parameter data, and stabilize the regression scenario.
commit_subject: config: Clone language map entries before modifying them

issue_title: Support subdirectory paths in .Render
issue_excerpt: Render views stored in layout subdirectories worked before the template-system rewrite, but .Render can no longer resolve those organized view paths.
intent: Restore subdirectory-aware view lookup for page rendering without changing the normal template search hierarchy.
commit_subject: tpl/tplimpl: Support sub paths in layouts passed to .Render

issue_title: `FieldNamingPolicy.upperCaseFirstLetter` uppercases trailing non-letters
issue_excerpt: FieldNamingPolicy can uppercase a trailing Unicode character that is not a letter, altering field names unexpectedly.
intent: Correct first-letter capitalization so non-letter prefixes and suffixes are preserved while eligible letters are still transformed.

issue_title: dotenv file arg should take precedence over default dotenv files
issue_excerpt: An explicitly selected dotenv file is loaded after the default files, so values from .env or .flaskenv can incorrectly win over the requested file.
intent: Restore the documented environment-file precedence across CLI startup while preserving the priority of the process environment.

issue_title: `provide_automatic_options` is weird
issue_excerpt: Automatic OPTIONS handling is configured and overridden inconsistently across routes, views, and application defaults, leading to surprising rule behavior.
intent: Make automatic OPTIONS behavior consistent across configuration, route registration, blueprints, and class-based views, with focused compatibility tests.

issue_title: No unreachable warning when duplicate field names on enum after rename attributes
issue_excerpt: Aliases and renamed fields or variants can collide without a useful compile-time diagnostic, creating ambiguous deserialization behavior.
intent: Detect conflicting aliases and serialized names during derive validation for structs and enums, with compile-fail coverage.
commit_subject: Add checks for conflicts for aliases

issue_title: Allow internal tag field in untagged variant
issue_excerpt: An untagged enum variant is rejected when it contains a field named like the enum's internal tag, even though that variant does not use internal tagging.
intent: Limit internal-tag conflict checks to variants where the conflict is meaningful, preserving validation for genuinely tagged variants.
commit_subject: Allow internal tag field in untagged variant

issue_title: the `join!` macro leaks some symbols into the caller's scope
issue_excerpt: join! and try_join! leak internal support symbols into the caller's scope, allowing code to compile without importing names it uses.
intent: Restore macro hygiene for both join macros and add compile-time regressions that prove internal names are not visible to callers.
commit_subject: macros: fix the hygiene issue of `join!` and `try_join!` (#7766)

issue_title: v4: z.input<typeof z.stringbool()> resolves to unknown, not literal string union
issue_excerpt: The static input type of stringbool is unknown even though runtime parsing only accepts a defined set of string literals.
intent: Align stringbool's type-level contract and runtime options across classic and mini APIs, including custom truthy and falsy values.

issue_title: Add a way to identify a non-Page HTML etc. resource
issue_excerpt: After content-resource handling changed, authors lack a reliable way to identify non-page HTML-like resources that should still be published.
intent: Add a configurable content-type classification that is honored consistently by decoding, media handling, source metadata, and publishing.

issue_title: `hugo list all` warnings are being sent to stdout
issue_excerpt: Warnings emitted by commands such as 'hugo list all' are mixed into stdout, corrupting output intended for machine consumption.
intent: Route diagnostic logging consistently away from command data output across the CLI, modules, tests, and integration helpers.
commit_subject: Write all logging (INFO, WARN, ERROR) to stderr

issue_title: Make the permalinks config less verbose and more flexible
issue_excerpt: Permalink configuration becomes verbose and inflexible for multilingual or multidimensional sites that need rules based on page characteristics.
intent: Introduce a more expressive permalink-rule model that can target pages across dimensions while preserving compatibility with existing configuration.
commit_subject: Add slice-based permalinks config with PageMatcher target

issue_title: remove ability to toggle lazy/eager loading
issue_excerpt: The eager/lazy application-loading switches describe an older startup model and now expose behavior that is confusing and no longer useful.
intent: Remove the obsolete loading-mode surface consistently from CLI parsing, application startup, documentation, and tests.

issue_title: deprecate most config attributes
issue_excerpt: Flask exposes an inconsistent subset of configuration keys as application attributes, creating redundant APIs and uneven behavior.
intent: Deprecate the unnecessary configuration shortcuts consistently across helpers, sessions, templates, documentation, and tests while retaining selected common attributes.

issue_title: `#[derive(Serialize)` and `#[derive(Deserialize)]` on deprecated types emit deprecation warnings
issue_excerpt: Deriving Serialize or Deserialize for deprecated items emits warnings from generated code, including paths that use custom conversion hooks.
intent: Suppress derive-internal deprecation noise consistently across serialization and deserialization without hiding warnings in user-authored code.

issue_title: Performance regression on high-QPS short-handler workloads since 1.51.0
issue_excerpt: A scheduler change introduced a high-QPS performance regression by waking parked workers on a formerly local fast path, with visible metric and fairness effects.
intent: Correct the scheduler behavior across queueing, worker notification, configuration, metrics, and loom coverage while preserving runtime correctness.
commit_subject: runtime: revert "steal tasks from the LIFO slot" (#8100)

issue_title: [v4]: z.registry size issue while using with recursive object
issue_excerpt: Recursive object schemas can repeatedly register metadata, causing duplicate identifier errors and registry memory growth beyond one gigabyte.
intent: Correct recursive schema construction so registries remain bounded and identifiers are not duplicated across classic and mini APIs, while preserving lazy schema behavior.

issue_title: Check allocs in the new partial lookup/descriptor logic
issue_excerpt: Profiling shows suspicious allocation overhead in the partial-template lookup and descriptor path.
intent: Reduce repeated allocation and lookup work in partial resolution without changing template selection semantics across page and shortcode call sites.
commit_subject: tpl: Add a partial lookup cache

issue_title: Slow server startup for large content trees
issue_excerpt: A site with about 60,000 content files can take minutes to start the development server even though a normal build finishes in seconds; path grouping dominates startup.
intent: Reduce development-server startup time for very large content trees while preserving complete and correct watcher coverage.
commit_subject: Fix slow server startup of very big content trees

issue_title: Consider moving project-level site methods to the hugo namespace
issue_excerpt: Several project-wide values live on a single Site object even though they describe all languages or the whole Hugo build.
intent: Reorganize project-level site information into the appropriate global API while providing a compatible transition for existing templates.
commit_subject: hugolib: Move site.Data to hugo.Data, deprecate Site.AllPages/BuildDrafts/Languages

issue_title: The avif/jpeg/webp.quality setting is set on the wrong level
issue_excerpt: Image quality and compression settings are represented at confusing levels, and generated configuration documentation does not show defaults consistently.
intent: Make image-format quality and compression configuration, defaults, and generated documentation coherent while retaining compatibility.
commit_subject: images: Deprecate Imaging.Compression and move it down to webp and avif configs

issue_title: request points to wrong object in debugger when threading is enabled
issue_excerpt: With threaded debugging, the preserved request can point at the wrong request object, and related test-client context behavior is inconsistent.
intent: Rework preserved request-context lifecycle handling so debugging, signals, and test clients observe the correct request without regressions.

issue_title: Flask silently overrides Jinja2 tojson filter
issue_excerpt: Flask silently replaces Jinja's configurable tojson filter with a less configurable implementation, making upstream configuration ineffective.
intent: Ensure template JSON serialization respects the configurable behavior users receive from Jinja while preserving Flask compatibility.

issue_title: pass context internally instead of using contextvars
issue_excerpt: Request dispatch repeatedly accesses context-local proxies, adding overhead and making the internal call flow harder to reason about.
intent: Reduce request-dispatch overhead from repeated context-local lookups while preserving behavior for subclasses, extensions, and templates.

issue_title: Regression in serde_codegen 0.7.4
issue_excerpt: A serde_codegen update generated code that no longer compiles for some generic Deserialize types, exposing an overreliance on type inference.
intent: Refactor generated deserialization code to be explicit enough for generic and custom-deserializer cases without changing successful runtime behavior.

issue_title: Revisit the representation of variant id for adjacently tagged enums
issue_excerpt: Adjacently tagged enum variant identifiers are serialized as plain strings but deserialized through a specialized variant path, causing inconsistent format interactions.
intent: Make adjacently tagged enum variant identifiers behave consistently across serialization, deserialization, and custom data formats.
commit_subject: Revisit of the representation of adjacently tagged enums tag
